basic_details.job_title: NICL Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 500 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The National Insurance Company Limited (NICL) has released a recruitment notification for Assistant posts in 2026. The organisation invites online applications from eligible candidates for 500 Assistant (Class III) vacancies.

important_dates.raw: Starting Date for Apply Online: 18-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 07-08-2026 Phase-I Online Examination Date: 27-08-2026 Phase-II Online Examination Date: 30-10-2026

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 Years Maximum Age: 30 Years Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

salary_details.details: Pay Scale: Rs. 36,290 - 80,615 Approximate Monthly Emoluments: Rs. 63,000 per month in Metropolitan Centres Additional allowances will be provided as per company rules.

selection_process: Phase-I Online Examination Phase-II Online Examination Regional Language Test Pre-Employment Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Visit the official NICL website nationalinsurance.nic.co.in.
Click on the online application link.
Complete the registration process using your email ID and mobile number.
Fill out the application form with correct details.
Pay the application fee if applicable.
Submit the application form and take a printout for future reference

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Starting Date for Apply Online: 18-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 07-08-2026 Phase-I Online Examination Date: 27-08-2026 Phase-II Online Examination Date: 30-10-2026

content_sections.heading: NICL Assistant Vacancy 2026 - Post Details
content_sections.text: NICL has announced 500 vacancies for Assistant (Class III) posts. The state-wise and category-wise vacancy details will be available in the detailed notification.

content_sections.heading: Who Can Apply for NICL Assistant Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Candidates fulfilling the required educational qualification and age criteria can apply for NICL Assistant posts. The eligibility details are as follows: Educational Qualification: Candidates must possess a Graduation degree in any discipline from a recognised University or equivalent qualification recognised by the Central Government. Regional Language Knowledge: Candidates must have knowledge of reading, writing and speaking the regional language of the State/UT for which they are applying.

content_sections.heading: NICL Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 Years Maximum Age: 30 Years Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: NICL Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Pay Scale
content_sections.text: Pay Scale: Rs. 36,290 - 80,615 Approximate Monthly Emoluments: Rs. 63,000 per month in Metropolitan Centres Additional allowances will be provided as per company rules.

content_sections.heading: NICL Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Phase-I Online Examination Phase-II Online Examination Regional Language Test Pre-Employment Medical Examination

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NICL Assistant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official NICL website nationalinsurance.nic.co.in. Open the Recruitment section. Read the detailed notification carefully. Click on the online application link. Complete the registration process using your email ID and mobile number. Fill out the application form with correct details. Upload required documents and photographs. Pay the application fee if applicable. Submit the application form and take a printout for future reference
